name: Auto-Staccato
short_description: Fight Your Music™ in this violent action rhythm game. Shoot to the beat in First Person Arena Shooter mode and slash enemies to the rhythm in lane-based Horde mode. Import your own music or play campaign with it's own soundtrack.
detailed_description:
Auto-Staccato is a badass new take on the rhythm game taking place in a fantasy setting. You must use your weapon or magic to “Fight Your Music” by hitting enemies in time to the beat. Featuring a campaign mode with a mix of worlds and arenas and included music, players can also battle against their own music.



  • Use Your Own Music: Automatic song analysis in an instant without need for any manual editing (mp3, wav and ogg support)
  • High quality music analyzer ensures best possible experience with your favorite songs
  • Gameplay and visuals adapt to the song tone, loudest notes are represented as bosses
  • Two drastically different game modes: lane-based Horde and First-Person Arena Shooter with Easy/Medium/Hard difficulties
  • Campaign Mode with 20 levels and included soundtrack
  • Skill upgrades including Armor, Life Steal, Focus, and Combo Multiplier Bonus
  • 9 Different environments
  • Score high combos to make enemies explode under your attacks
